data.content:
美团
Meituan is the platform where the order was placed and completed.

User
The user is a customer who placed the order and holds Black Gold membership status on Meituan.

Black Gold Member
Black Gold Member (黑金会员) is a membership level on Meituan platform with 4-star rating.

黄浦路
Huangpu Road is the location associated with the supermarket branch.<SEP>黄浦路is a specific store location mentioned as an example for geocoding.

Total Payment
The final amount paid by the customer, totaling ¥97.8.

Customer
The implicit user who placed the order and holds a membership level.

Delivery Fee
A fee of ¥10 that was waived for this order.

Meituan
Meituan is a Chinese technology platform that provides food delivery and retail services, where the order was placed.<SEP>A platform where products are sold and queries are executed.

Order
The order is a completed transaction on Meituan platform with total payment of ¥97.8.

Packaging Fee
A fee of ¥1 charged for packaging in the order.

乐购达超市(黄浦路店)
Legou Da Supermarket Huangpu Road Branch is the merchant that sold the goods in the order.

安心闪购
A service guarantee program covering the order with return policies.

Growth Points
Growth Points are dynamic values earned by members through activities like orders.<SEP>Growth Points are loyalty points earned by the user, with +98 from this order and 18594 total current value.

Huangpu Road
Huangpu Road (黄浦路) is the location where the Legou Da Supermarket branch is situated.

Legou Da Supermarket
Legou Da Supermarket (乐购达超市) is a retail store located on Huangpu Road that sold products in this order.

Black Gold Membership
A membership status level held by the customer, indicated by a 4-star rating.

Completed Order
The transaction event where the user purchased items and payment was processed successfully.

HD Network Camera
HD Network Camera (网络摄像头) is a product with 1080P resolution that was purchased in the order.

Product
Product is an item for sale that can be listed with specific attributes like return policies.

Anxin Flash Purchase
Anxin Flash Purchase (安心闪购) is a service guarantee that includes 7-day no-reason return policy.

Membership Level
Membership Level is a dynamic attribute defining user status and associated benefits.

Benefits
Benefits are dynamic properties granted based on membership level.

Product Title
Product Title is a data field describing the product, which may contain quantity information like "1个".

Quantity Field
Quantity Field is a data attribute indicating the item count, which may conflict with the product title.

Store Location
Store Location is an attribute that can be geocoded for spatial queries.

Data Structure
Data Structure refers to the modeled information schema enabling rich querying.

Promotional Logic
Promotional Logic refers to rule-based conditions governing promotions like free delivery.

Return Policy
Return Policy is a product attribute defining conditions for returns, such as a 7-day window.

免配送费
免配送费is a specific promotional concept implying conditional logic such as free delivery.

Black Gold Members
Black Gold Members are a specific tier within the membership level system.

Orders
Orders are transaction records that can be queried based on member status and benefits.

JSON-LD
JSON-LD is a format option for exporting the data structure.

Supermarkets
Supermarkets are organizations that sell products on platforms.

RDF/TTL
RDF/TTL is a format option for exporting the data structure.

Geolocation
A method or property for encoding store locations for spatial queries.

Dynamic Attributes
Properties such as membership level and growth points that change over time or state.

Products
Items sold by supermarkets on Meituan, subject to return policies.

7-Day Return Policy
A policy attribute associated with products sold by supermarkets.

李飞飞
李飞飞is a person who graduated from Princeton University in 1999, researched Tibetan medicine in Tibet, received a doctoral degree from California Institute of Technology in 2005, and served as assistant professor at University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign and Princeton University.

普林斯顿大学
Princeton University is an educational institution where李飞飞completed undergraduate studies in 1999 and later served as assistant professor in the Computer Science Department from 2007 to 2009.

藏药
Tibetan medicine is a field of study that李飞飞researched for one year in Tibet.

西藏
Tibet is a location where李飞飞conducted one year of research on Tibetan medicine after graduation in 1999.

计算机科学系
The Computer Science Department is a department at Princeton University where李飞飞served as assistant professor from 2007 to 2009.

助理教授
Assistant Professor is an academic job title held by Li Feifei at multiple universities.

data.entity_name: 伊利诺伊大学厄巴纳-香槟分校
data.content:
伊利诺伊大学厄巴纳-香槟分校
University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign is an educational institution where李飞飞served as assistant professor in the Electrical Engineering Department from 2005 to 2006.

电机系
The Electrical Engineering Department is a department at University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign where李飞飞served as assistant professor.

加州理工学院
California Institute of Technology is an educational institution where李飞飞entered in 2000 and received a doctoral degree in 2005.

博士学位
Doctoral degree is an academic qualification that李飞飞received from California Institute of Technology in 2005.
